Some of the best homemade sandwiches on the route. Excellent place to relax, good restrooms, and friendly service.

reviews.comment:
Increíble sándwich de matambre arrollado! Buena atención y muy atentos!

Me olvide un termo negro Paso a la vuelta espero recuperarlo! 🙏🙏
Pase al otro día y sentí que no me lo olvide sino que se los dejé para que me lo cuiden impecable

(Translated by Google)
Amazing rolled flank steak sandwich! Great service and very attentive!

I forgot a black thermos. I'll stop by next time and hope to get it back! 🙏🙏 I went back the next day and felt like I hadn't forgotten it, but rather left it there for them to take perfect care of.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por tu comentario. Te esperamos nuevamente.
